originalTitle: U.S. confirms retaliatory strike on Iran, pulling oil prices up in after-hours trading
summary: Oil futures settled lower to post a third-straight weekly loss on Friday, but moved up in extended trading after the U.S. military confirmed a retaliatory strike on Iran.
content: Oil futures settled lower to post a third-straight weekly loss on Friday, but moved up in extended trading after the U.S. military confirmed a retaliatory strike on Iran.
chineseTitle: 美国确认对伊朗实施报复性打击 盘后盘中油价上涨
chineseSummary: 周五石油期货收低，连续第三周下跌，但在美国军方确认对伊朗进行报复性打击后，在延长交易中上涨。
chineseContent: 周五石油期货收低，连续第三周下跌，但在美国军方确认对伊朗进行报复性打击后，在延长交易中上涨。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
